projectDescription: A production-grade persistence layer for backtest-kit that replaces file-based storage with MongoDB as the source of truth and Redis as an O(1) lookup cache, packaged with docker-compose for one-command deploys.
keyFeatures: 15 custom IPersist* adapters implementing the full backtest-kit persistence contract on MongoDB + Redis
Atomic findOneAndUpdate upserts with compound unique indexes — eliminates E11000 duplicate key race conditions
Redis O(1) context-key → MongoDB _id cache with automatic cold-start backfill on cache miss
Look-ahead bias protection via indexed `when: Date` column on all signal-affecting adapters
Soft-delete semantics for Measure, Interval, and Memory adapters matching default file-based behavior
docker-compose layout: isolated MongoDB and Redis containers plus a full backtest-kit container
Three running modes: backtest, paper, and live — switchable via CLI flags or container env vars
CCXT Binance exchange adapter with OHLCV fetching, order book, and price/quantity formatting
publicApiSurface: BaseCRUD (create, update, findById, findByFilter, findAll, iterate, paginate)
BaseMap (get, set, delete, has, clear, toArray, iterate, keys, values, size)
addFrameSchema({ frameName, interval, startDate, endDate, note })
addExchangeSchema({ exchangeName, getCandles, getOrderBook, formatPrice, formatQuantity })
warmCandles({ exchangeName, from, to, interval, symbol })
getArgs() → { values: { entry, backtest, live, paper } }
